title: CCDR: Volume 49-11/12, November/December 2023: HIV and Other Sexually Transmitted and Blood-Borne Infections - Canada.ca
content:
## CCDR: Volume 49-11/12, November/December 2023: HIV and Other Sexually Transmitted and Blood-Borne Infections
- Information for authors
Risk of sexual transmission of HIV in the context of viral load suppression P Djiadeu, H Begum,  S Sabourin, S Gadient, C Archibald, M-A LeBlanc, A Chittle,  A Fleurant, J Cox
Estimation of the population size of gay, bisexual and other men who have sex with men in Canada, 2020 J Sorge, S Colyer,  J Cox, A Kroch, N Lachowsky, N Popovic, Q Yang
Mycoplasma genitalium infection among gay, bisexual and other men  who have sex with men in Montréal, Canada A-S Lê, A-C Labbé,  A Fourmigue, M Dvorakova, J Cox, C Fortin, I Martin, D Grace,  T Hart, D Moore, G Lambert, the Engage Study Team
Implementation Science
Establishing Pandemic  Influenza Severity Assessment (PISA) parameters and thresholds for Canada’s  FluWatch program FluWatch Team
Does the Australian influenza season predict the Canadian influenza season? A qualitative comparison of seasons, 2014–2020 D Chan, L Lee,  C Bancej
Syndromic surveillance performance in Canada  throughout the COVID-19 pandemic, March 1, 2020 to March 4, 2023 M Ben Moussa, A Rahal, L Lee, S Mukhi
Thank you to the CCDR  peer reviewers of 2023
